label: Victorian Council Master
description: Mother reference table for Victoria's 79 councils, joining canonical names, spatial identity, cohort geography, electoral structure, performance context and governance coverage.

council_geography.name: victorian-council-geography.json
council_geography.notes: Local Vicmap-derived geography and council office coordinates built by scripts/build_council_geography.py.

victoria_in_future_regions.notes: Used for metropolitan region and Regional Partnership mappings; numeric VIF spreadsheets are not copied into the repo.

rows.vif_region_note: Mitchell Shire is split between the Northern metropolitan region and Goulburn Regional Partnership in VIF definitions.
